entries.meaning: A declared human-readable authority is missing or differs from the normative machine architecture registration.
Assurance Lite authority, non-blocking, bounded-scope, or lifecycle-claim invariants were changed.
The mandatory Repository Implementation Assurance Lite architecture registration is missing or not an object.
A human-readable Assurance Lite projection carries a revision that does not hash its embedded registration.
Assurance Lite task integration references an unknown, missing, or unauthorized PPQR task identity.
An unauthorized task is declared execution-eligible.
Canonical CI does not execute the governance validator entrypoint.
Current scope selector is invalid or points to a mismatched scope.
The task dependency graph contains a cycle.
Canonical task dependencies differ from the approved graph.
A task depends on itself.
A task depends on an unknown task identifier.
A validator or fixture references an unregistered diagnostic code.
Declared execution eligibility differs from dependency-derived eligibility.
Task implementation or completion lacks exact-head evidence.
exact_main_verified lacks authoritative exact-current-main evidence.
exact_main_verified occurs before owner_merge.
exact_main_verified does not bind the current default-branch head.
A feature branch claims lifecycle completion.
Observed diagnostics differ from the exact fixture expectation.
Required base-to-head Git evidence could not be obtained.
Impact history contains a duplicate impact_id.
Impact history contains a duplicate sequence number.
impact_hash does not match canonical impact content.
Impact history contains more than one successor for a predecessor.
A historical impact differs from its merge-base content.
Impact predecessor does not bind the immediately previous impact.
Impact sequence is not contiguous.
event_hash does not match canonical event content.
Lifecycle event identifier was replayed.
Lifecycle evidence digest was replayed.
Exact-head lifecycle evidence binds a stale head.
Lifecycle ledger or event identity differs from the canonical repository, program, task, base, or PR context.
ledger_hash does not match canonical ledger content.
Lifecycle event does not bind its immediate predecessor.
Lifecycle event or ledger binds a stale scope revision.
Lifecycle event order is not a valid prefix of the canonical sequence.
Lifecycle timestamps are not monotonic.
Human-readable current status differs from machine-derived program state.
Migration promotion is claimed without Migration Promotion Gate evidence.
More than one production path is authoritative.
new_only authority is claimed without legacy-retirement evidence.
owner_merge lacks authoritative owner-controlled merge evidence.
A task is complete before implementation, dependencies, merge, or exact-main evidence.
A task is implemented before all dependencies are complete and eligibility is established.
Program completion is claimed while at least one task remains incomplete.
A task identifier occurs more than once.
An unregistered substantive task was added to the canonical registry.
Program or repository identity does not match the canonical activation identity.
A required canonical PPQR task is missing.
Canonical task titles, purposes, or preferred metadata differ from the approved registry.
Task registry does not contain exactly fifteen tasks.
Non-zero progress is claimed without material obligation or deliverable closure.
Declared before/after baseline differs from derived repository state.
Declared progress does not match derived output and state evidence.
Impact references an unknown deliverable.
Impact exact-head claim differs from derived head evidence.
An obligation identifier is claimed more than once.
Impact references an unknown obligation.
Impact scope revision differs from the current valid scope.
Impact task identity differs from the current scope.
Quality credit or improvement is claimed without required quality evidence.
A required activation output is absent.
Artifact does not conform to its registered strict schema.
Scope amendment hash, predecessor chain, or added-path membership is invalid.
Scope base SHA does not match the validated base identity.
An exact-files path was declared but did not change.
Deferred work was deleted or removed from preservation memory.
Scope paths expanded without a new canonical revision.
Observed operation conflicts with forbidden_changes.
Scope program identity is not canonical.
A path was modified before its scope amendment authorization commit.
scope_revision does not match canonical scope content.
A deletion occurred without explicit authorization.
Scope task identity is not the authorized work item.
Actual diff contains an undeclared path.
Zero-delta work type or effects violate the zero-delta policy.
Three consecutive quality-sensitive zero-delta increments are present.
